data.jsCode: function txt(){if(message&&message.text){return String(message.text).trim()}return ""}function ask(t){send_message({text:t,parse_mode:"HTML"})}function clean(){delete_context("_complaint_step")}var steps=[{key:"complaint_topic",prompt:get_context("param_topic_prompt")||"Shikoyat mavzusini yozing:",error:"Mavzuni kiriting.",min:3},{key:"complaint_details",prompt:get_context("param_details_prompt")||"Shikoyat tafsilotlarini yozing:",error:"Kamida 5 ta belgi kiriting.",min:5},{key:"complaint_order_ref",prompt:get_context("param_ref_prompt")||"Buyurtma ID yoki reference bo'lsa yozing. Bo'lmasa '-' yuboring:",error:"Javobni qayta yuboring.",min:1}];var step=parseInt(get_context("_complaint_step")||"0",10);var answer=txt();if(answer.toLowerCase()==="/cancel"){clean();exit("cancelled")}if(step>0){var prev=steps[step-1];var value=answer;if(prev.key==="complaint_order_ref"&&value==="-"){value=""}if(value.length<(prev.min||1)){ask(prev.error+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");wait_for_input()}set_context(prev.key,value)}if(step>=steps.length){send_message({text:get_context("param_success_message")||("Shikoyatingiz qabul qilindi. 📝 "+(get_context("complaint_topic")||"")+" 📄 "+(get_context("complaint_details")||"")+" 🔖 "+(get_context("complaint_order_ref")||"-")),parse_mode:"HTML"});clean();exit("completed")}ask(steps[step].prompt+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");set_context("_complaint_step",String(step+1));wait_for_input();
